title: BEM-840 one action reset
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 05:59 (UTC+3)'
qdir=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')
idir=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid')
removed=[]
for p in sorted(qdir.glob('*.json')):
    archived=idir/(p.name+'.one_action_reset.txt')
    archived.write_text(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    p.unlink()
    removed.append({'path':str(p),'archived_as':str(archived)})
fresh=qdir/'bem840_single_valid_claude_dispatch.json'
fresh.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 one-action reset: exactly one valid Claude dispatcher retry item','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':'one_action_dispatch_queue_reset_done','removed_count':len(removed),'removed':removed,'single_queue_item':str(fresh),'next_required':'run one tick and inspect one result only','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_one_action_reset_dispatch_queue.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_one_action_reset_dispatch_queue.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | One Action Reset Dispatch Queue | DONE'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('ONE NEXT ACTION ONLY: run one tick and inspect one workflow_dispatch_results result. No route chain. No issue comments.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'ONE NEXT ACTION ONLY: run one tick and inspect one workflow_dispatch_results result.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem840_one_action_reset_dispatch_queue.json','governance/reports/bem840_one_action_reset_dispatch_queue.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl',str(fresh)]
for x in removed: changed.append(x['archived_as'])
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('ONE ACTION ONLY: reset workflow_dispatch_queue to exactly one valid Claude dispatcher queue item')
"""
No issue comments.
